summary: Executed backend + frontend validation for Maison Aurelle storefront flows and required APIs. All critical requested flows passed in this run.

issues: During immediate post-navigation capture, product area briefly showed loading state with 0 pieces; resolves after query completes (transient UX flicker).

action_items: Optional UX improvement: reduce mobile Shop loading flicker by preserving previous query data/skeleton handling.
When Shopify credentials are available, replace MOCKED seed catalog with live Shopify sync/integration tests.
critical_code_review_comments: Catalog and Shopify readiness are MOCKED/local-seed based as expected; no live Shopify connection yet.
Frontend API base URL correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and /api prefix.
Interactive elements across tested flows include data-testid and were automatable.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created; used existing local seeded catalog and created test bespoke inquiries via API/UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite for requested APIs is available at /app/backend/tests/test_storefront_api.py. UI run validated home, shop filters/search/custom-only, product detail, wishlist, cart quantity/remove, bespoke submit, and responsive nav on public preview URL.
rca of the issue: No blocking defects found. Initial Playwright failure ('cart increase button outside viewport') was test interaction/viewport scroll behavior in cart sheet, not product logic; resolved by scrolling target into view before click.
